creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Seems the phpMyAdmin developers have seen fit to re-roll the 2.8.2.2
release tarball with various cosmetic changes but using the same version
number.  Grrrrr....

Pointed out by pointyhat 

    http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.5.2006072607/phpMyAdmin-2.8.2.2.log
